scripts.deploy:prod: aws codebuild start-build --project-name getpaidhq --source-version main --profile=cj-prod --environment-variables-override name=STAGE,value=prod,type=PLAINTEXT
scripts.deploy:test: aws codebuild start-build --project-name getpaidhq --source-version main --profile=cj-test --environment-variables-override name=STAGE,value=test,type=PLAINTEXT
